message:
test(e2e): add JIT hot-query replay and chain-memory benchmark e2e tests

Add two new deterministic e2e test suites with full artifact emission
and replay metadata conforming to the cross-cutting quality contract.

bd_1rw_3_jit_hot_query_replay.rs (bd-1rw.3):
- Exercises the JIT scaffold PRAGMA surface end-to-end: enable/disable,
  hot_threshold, cache_capacity, jit_stats snapshot, and jit_reset
- Validates hot-query triggering by executing SELECT loops past the
  threshold and asserting compilations_total and cache_hits_total > 0
- Confirms compile-failure fallback produces correct results when
  unsupported opcodes (cursor-based) are present
- Emits a JSON artifact with per-test timing, seed, and replay command

bd_2y306_4_chain_memory_benchmarks.rs (bd-2y306.4):
- Benchmarks MVCC version-chain memory behavior under three workload
  distributions: hot-page, uniform, and zipf
- Tests long-reader impact: pins a snapshot while writers update,
  measures chain growth and memory, then releases and verifies cleanup
- Validates chain-bound guard and backpressure guard correctness
- Emits a JSON artifact with workload metrics, memory samples, and
  deterministic replay metadata

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
